title: FUNCTION KILL

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Kill a function that is currently executing. The `FUNCTION KILL` command can be used only on functions that did not modify the dataset during their execution (since stopping a read-only function does not violate the scripting engine's guaranteed atomicity). For more information please refer to [Introduction to Redis Functions](). ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Simple string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#simple-strings): `OK`. **RESP3:** [Simple string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#simple-strings): `OK`.
